title: August 9th, 2022
body:
lyrics

run through with tenets
i rent to the tenants i tend to attend and tend to
at least i intend to
attempt to
i'm tempted too
tiptoe through the tendrils trippin you
tiptop timin tumblin when i'm in trouble tryin to get to you
truckin cuz i traffic in magic
not gettin trapped in a tragic when i can do something different
dabbin the sweat
smile then i'm dashin
dancing
let's do a duet
